name: vantage
description: Vantage — AI-augmented vulnerability console (scan-and-report ONLY). MCP tools to read the finding register, check an asset against the approved-scope inventory, request authorized scans (server-side scope gate, fail-closed), diff scans / verify closure, drive the human-gated triage + exception + escalation workflows, and generate dual-password reports. No tool exploits, attacks, or acts on a target.
